# Daemon Config Reference Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/configreference -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`config-reference.riido.json`](config-reference.riido.json).

Keeps the public riido-daemon env and flag catalog generated from a manifest and verified against daemon config source constants.

## Daemon Env Catalog

| Variable | Consumer | Default | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_ID` | daemon identity | RIIDO_DEVICE_ID in SaaS mode, else agentd-local | stable daemon/runtime slot id |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_VERSION` | daemon config and supervisor events | riido-agentd v0.0.0 | daemon binary version label |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_PROFILE` | daemon status and diagnostics | local | user-facing daemon profile; dev/development enables loopback pprof by default |
| `RIIDO_SERVER_URL` | daemon status | empty | display-only server URL unless SaaS source is configured |
| `RIIDO_DEVICE_ID` | saasplane | empty | device principal id |
| `RIIDO_DEVICE_SECRET` | saasplane | empty | sent only as X-Riido-Device-Secret |
| `RIIDO_DEVICE_NAME` | daemon status | hostname or localhost | device display name |
| `RIIDO_RUNTIME_OWNER` | daemon status | $USER or local | runtime owner display name |
| `RIIDO_RUNTIME_AGENTS` | daemon status | empty list | comma-separated attached agent names |
| `RIIDO_WORKSPACE_COUNT` | daemon status | 0 | non-negative display count |
| `RIIDO_RUNTIME_MAX_CONCURRENT` | runtime actor slot pool | 4 | max concurrent sessions per provider |
| `RIIDO_WORKDIR_ROOT` | supervisor and workdir FS adapter | C11 app data root | isolated run workdir root |
| `RIIDO_POLICY_BUNDLE_VERSION` | config/runtime/workdir | policy-bundle.local.v0 | active policy version |
| `RIIDO_POLICY_BUNDLE_PATH` | policy loader | empty | optional riido-policy-bundle.v1 file |
| `RIIDO_TASK_QUEUE_DIR` | file queue source | empty | provider-neutral task JSON files |
| `RIIDO_TASK_REPORT_DIR` | file reporter | RIIDO_TASK_QUEUE_DIR/reports | JSONL report output |
| `RIIDO_TASK_DB_SOURCE_PATH` | taskdbplane | empty | local riido-task-db.v1 production source |
| `RIIDO_SAAS_URL` | saasplane | empty | SaaS assignment polling endpoint |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS` | supervisor | 1 | active claim polling interval |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_IDLE_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS` | supervisor | 5 | idle retry interval; must be >= active interval |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS` | supervisor | 5 | runtime heartbeat interval |
| `RIIDO_WORKDIR_RETENTION_SECONDS` | workdir cleanup | 0 | archived workdir TTL cleanup; zero disables |
| `RIIDO_WORKDIR_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_SECONDS` | workdir cleanup | 3600 with retention | cleanup loop interval |
| `RIIDO_DAEMON_PPROF_ADDR` | local diagnostics | empty, or dev default 127.0.0.1:6061 | loopback-only pprof listener |

## Coverage Anchors

- `RIIDO_CLAUDE_PATH`: provider executable override (`internal/provider/claude/detect.go`)
- `RIIDO_CODEX_PATH`: provider executable override (`internal/provider/codex/detect.go`)
- `RIIDO_OPENCLAW_PATH`: provider executable override (`internal/provider/openclaw/detect_config.go`)
- `RIIDO_CURSOR_PATH`: provider executable override (`internal/provider/cursor/constants.go`)
- `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION`: real provider CLI integration opt-in (`internal/provider/claude/integration_gate_test.go`)

## Assertions

- SaaS server RIIDO_AI_SERVER_* variables belong to riido-control-plane
- private deploy-time evidence paths belong to riido-infra
- new env vars or flags must update config-reference and parser tests in the same PR
- workdir cleanup has no default size/task-count cleanup
